case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS TREJO RUTH

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO RUTH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $225.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $463.60 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO RUTH

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,325.15 AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO RUTH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TREJO RUTH $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $43.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,543.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
